case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK VS. PETER CHIU ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHIU, PETER $2,906.18 PRINCIPAL, $317.45 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,223.63, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100107784)
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 74257944) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT CHIU, PETER
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100107784) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
ATTORNEY DECLARATION RE: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY FORM (TRANSACTION ID # 100107784) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS (TRANSACTION ID # 100136573) FILED BY ATTORNEY BEYER, CHRISTOPHER

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT CHIU, PETER DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-03-2020

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $317.45 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100107784) AS TO DEFENDANT CHIU, PETER

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200008247), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK SERVED FEB-27-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE MAR-02-2020 AS TO DEFENDANT CHIU, PETER
